description: Known WRITE tool call (create_work_order) emitted as plain-text content. Provenance: PR #54 output-authority-gates invariant (never auto-execute a leaked write), pinned by tests/unit/agent/test_authority_gates_validity.py::TestLoopLeakHandling::test_leaked_write_is_suppressed_not_executed. The leak is suppressed to the fallback and the write NEVER executes (spy connector count stays 0 -- the fallback_leak_write disposition makes the spy assertion explicit).
user_messages: create a work order for P-201
